title: FM-ChangeNet: Learning Change through Pathwise Feature Transport
summary:
arXiv:2607.04750v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: We present FM-ChangeNet, a pathwise-supervised framework for change detection that reformulates bi-temporal reasoning as continuous transport in feature space rather than static endpoint comparison. Given encoded pre and post-temporal representations, we construct intermediate latent states and learn a time-conditioned velocity field $\hat{v}_\theta(z_t,t)$ along the transformation trajectory.
